subject: [PATCH v5 2/3] cxl/core/region: move dax region device logic into region_dax.c

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Questioned whether the code move is purely non-functional and if it would cause issues with the original code. Suggested that the author double-check their work.

reviews.author: Dan Williams
reviews.summary: Confirmed that the moved code does not exist in mainline, thus making Gregory's concerns about functional changes unfounded.
reviews.raw_body:
Gregory Price wrote:
> On Fri, Apr 10, 2026 at 05:02:00PM -0700, Anisa Su wrote:
> > > +
> > > +	cxlr_dax->hpa_range.start = p->res->start;
> > > +	cxlr_dax->hpa_range.end = p->res->end;
> > > +
> > > +	dev = &cxlr_dax->dev;
> > > +	cxlr_dax->cxlr = cxlr;
> > 	cxlr->cxlr_dax = cxlr_dax;
> > 
> > Running into segfaults without this ^
> 
> This should have been a purely non-functional change (the code is just
> moving from A to B without changes).
> 
> That would mean the original code should run into this too unless I
> mucked up the move.

I do not think you mucked anything up ->cxlr_dax does not exist in mainline.

2026-04-11.patch_summary: Move of dax region device logic from cxl/core/region to region_dax.c
